title: Composite ideas
content_html:
Composite ideas

Create versions of a composite by changing the order of the layers

Each version then becomes a frame in the video sequence for slowing down

6 source photos produces 6! ￼composites

720/25￼seconds of raw video So slowed down 16*28.8/60￼min each composite will last about .6s i.e it will be fast!

So will need to select subset of permutations or make a much longer video for it to be slower

and that’s only 6 source photos ideally want a subset of much larger number of layers

However, only 9!￼

See ChatGPT for Processing implementation ideas

File naming

[index]_[permutation]

1_123 2_213 3_231

Etc
